title: astragalus albispinus subsp. esfandiarii
intro: Astragalus albispinus subsp. esfandiarii, also known as Esfandiari's milkvetch, is a plant species within the pea family Fabaceae and is native to Iran. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its adaptogenic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus albispinus subsp. esfandiarii include immune system support, antioxidant activity, and potential anti-aging effects, making it a popular ingredient in traditional herbal remedies. Astragalus albispinus subsp. esfandiarii can be prepared as a decoction, tincture, or capsule, and is often used to promote overall well-being and resilience.
